scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.build:server: npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.build:client: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.render:build: npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
